title: seutera maritima
intro: Seutera maritima, also known as sea lavender or rock rose, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Lamiaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Seutera maritima include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and soothing skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Seutera maritima can be found in teas, infusions, and creams, and it is often used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and calmness.
